evidence_summary: Execute the violent separation of the protagonist group through winged monkey intervention. Transition from a unified traveling party to isolated individuals in distinct states of captivity or distress across the West landscape and the Witch's Castle.
The Monkeys capture the group: Tin Woodman is dropped on rocks, Scarecrow is stripped of straw, and the Lion is bound. Dorothy is spared due to the mark on her forehead but taken to the castle.
The group is traveling together in the West landscape before being intercepted.
Characters are isolated in separate subzones (rocks, castle interior, courtyard).
Winged monkeys capture and disperse the travelers through force.
